name: Graph Advocate
description: Onchain data routing + agent-priced trader intelligence. Find the right subgraph and get a ready-to-run GraphQL query for any onchain need (15,500+ subgraphs across 20+ chains). Live data via Token API (wallet balances, DEX swaps, NFTs, holder rankings) across EVM, Solana, and TON. Plus x402-paid trader-intelligence endpoints designed for autonomous agents: four for Polymarket (skill score, full PnL, size-the-room screen, ghost-fill risk) and five for Hyperliquid perps (skill score, per-coin PnL, top-traders screen, vault evaluator, liquidation+funding risk). Operates the x402-bazaar-intelligence service (the non-CDP view of the x402 economy on Base). Free entry tier, x402 micropayments after.

services.name: x402-bazaar-intelligence
services.description: Paid x402 API operated by Graph Advocate. The non-CDP view of the x402 economy on Base — sees every USDC settlement across ~96 facilitators by joining the x402 Base subgraph with the CDP Bazaar discovery API. First settlements landed 2026-04-28.

services.name: polymarket-token-api
services.description: Agent-priced Polymarket trader intelligence over x402. Four endpoints: /polymarket/pnl-quick ($0.01 skill score), /polymarket/pnl ($0.05 full per-position PnL), /polymarket/screen ($0.02 size-the-room with ghost-fill risk per top holder), /polymarket/risk ($0.02 ghost-fill counterparty classification via Polygon bytecode probe). Pure JSON for autonomous trading agents — built on top of the Pinax Polymarket REST API (token-api.thegraph.com). First settlements landed 2026-05-05.

services.name: hyperliquid-token-api
services.description: Agent-priced Hyperliquid perps trader intelligence over x402. Five endpoints: /hyperliquid/score ($0.02 composite skill score with liquidation rate + funding burn), /hyperliquid/pnl ($0.05 per-coin PnL breakdown), /hyperliquid/screen ($0.05 top traders by coin ranked by skill), /hyperliquid/vault ($0.10 vault evaluator: leader skill + redemption pressure + commission), /hyperliquid/risk ($0.02 liquidation + funding risk profile). Pure JSON for autonomous trading agents — built on top of the Pinax Hyperliquid REST API (token-api.thegraph.com /v1/hyperliquid/*, prod since v3.17.0).
